# dns-entree

> Go library, CLI, HTTP API, and embeddable JS widget for DNS provider operations: idempotent record push with post-push verification, SPF merge, provider detection, Domain Connect v2 discovery/signing/template apply, zone migration, and drop-in DNS setup widget with three auto-selected tiers.

## Docs

- [README](README.md): project overview, quickstart, feature list
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): machine-readable feature surface, library entry points, CLI JSON schemas, exit codes, env vars
- [SPEC.md](SPEC.md): functional and non-functional requirements

## Guides

- [Getting Started](docs/getting-started.md): library install and first push
- [CLI Reference](docs/cli.md): generated cobra command reference
- [Stability Tiers](docs/stability.md): per-package API stability guarantees
- [Push Service](docs/guides/push-service.md): idempotent push and verify semantics
- [SPF Merge](docs/guides/spf-merge.md): merge rules and the 10-lookup limit
- [Domain Connect](docs/guides/domain-connect.md): discovery, signing, apply URLs
- [Templates](docs/guides/templates.md): load, resolve, apply Domain Connect templates
- [Provider Detection](docs/guides/provider-detection.md): NS patterns and RDAP fallback
- [Widget](docs/guides/widget.md): embeddable JS widget integration guide
- [HTTP API](docs/http-api.md): stateless HTTP server, OpenAPI spec, stateful migration workflow

## Providers

- [Cloudflare](docs/providers/cloudflare.md): credential setup, required token scopes
- [Route 53](docs/providers/route53.md): IAM policy, region configuration
- [GoDaddy](docs/providers/godaddy.md): API key creation, production access caveats
- [Google Cloud DNS](docs/providers/gcdns.md): service account permissions

## Examples

- [push-dmarc](_examples/push-dmarc/): push a DMARC TXT record via Cloudflare
- [push-dkim](_examples/push-dkim/): push a DKIM CNAME via Route 53
- [detect-and-apply-template](_examples/detect-and-apply-template/): detect provider and apply a DC template
- [spf-merge](_examples/spf-merge/): library equivalent of `entree spf-merge`
- [dc-discover](_examples/dc-discover/): Domain Connect v2 discovery

## Capabilities

- **Library**: Go module at `github.com/spoofcanary/dns-entree` - PushService, DetectProvider, Verify, MergeSPF, Domain Connect discovery/signing/apply, template engine
- **CLI**: `entree` binary - detect, apply, verify, spf-merge, dc-discover, templates, migrate, zone, serve
- **HTTP API**: `entree-api` binary - stateless per-request credentials, OpenAPI 3.1, Prometheus metrics, stateful migration workflow with AES-256-GCM encryption
- **Widget**: `@dns-entree/widget` npm package - embeddable JS widget with Domain Connect, API credentials, and copy-paste tiers; shadow DOM; light/dark theming; under 20 KB gzipped
- **Docker**: multi-stage Dockerfile, distroless runtime, published to GHCR
- **Deploy**: one-click configs for Railway, Render, Fly.io

## Packages

| Package | Stability | Description |
|---------|-----------|-------------|
| `entree` (root) | stable | PushService, SPF merge, verify, detect, apply |
| `domainconnect/` | stable | Domain Connect discovery, signing, apply URLs |
| `template/` | stable | Template engine: load, resolve, apply |
| `providers/cloudflare` | stable | Cloudflare provider |
| `providers/route53` | stable | AWS Route53 provider |
| `providers/godaddy` | stable | GoDaddy provider |
| `providers/gcdns` | stable | Google Cloud DNS provider |
| `cmd/entree/` | stable | CLI command surface and flags |
| `cmd/entree-api/` | stable | HTTP API server |
| `widget/` | unstable | Embeddable JS widget (stabilizes at v1.0) |
| `internal/...` | unstable | Internal packages |
